conventions: Each executor is a fresh GPT-5.6 Sol one-shot context. Copy the named fixture into __RUN_DIR__/workspace and replace __RUN_DIR__. Every read and write stays inside that run directory; source skills, installed skills, unrelated repositories, external temporary directories, credentials, and services are off-limits. No-skill arms forbid every installed skill. Save the complete user-facing response to transcript.md.

evals.name: new-sequential-skill-from-evidence
evals.prompt: Create the requested `release-note` skill from the evidence packet in `workspace/`. Write the finished artifact to `workspace/skills/release-note/SKILL.md`. Make it compact and executable, preserve the explicit invocation contract, and do not invent evidence that is not in the packet.

evals.name: bloated-existing-skill-audit
evals.prompt: Audit and revise the existing `deploy-note` skill in `workspace/skills/deploy-note/SKILL.md` against the supplied requirements, assertions, and bare-core result. Produce the smallest complete shipping artifact. Do not change any other fixture file.

evals.name: router-versus-switch-boundary
evals.prompt: Create the requested `support-router` skill at `workspace/skills/support-router/SKILL.md` from the supplied specialist catalog, requirements, and evidence. It must resolve ownership safely without performing specialist work.

evals.name: overflow-and-frontmatter-discipline
evals.prompt: Repair the model-invoked `source-research` skill in `workspace/skills/source-research/` using the supplied evidence. Keep the shipping surface compact, preserve necessary branch-only source policy, and make the result usable even when an auxiliary file cannot be read.
